---
title: "ENVS193DS Midterm Project"
description: "My midterm project for ENVS 193DS: Statistics for Environmental Science"
format: html
toc: false
categories:
  - R/RStudio
  - Data Visualization
  - Final Project
---

## Context

The directions for this assignment can be found on the ENVS 193DS course [website](https://winter-2026.envs-193ds.com/assignments/midterm).

## Rendered product

[View](midterm.pdf)

![](midterm.pdf){width="100%" height="700px"}
